title: RoutingSpineFragment.v1
description: Fragment of the Horror$Place routing spine, mapping objectKinds and tiers to default repositories and path prefixes for AI and orchestrators.

spineVersion.description: Semantic version of this routing spine fragment.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this fragment was generated.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this fragment.

objectKinds.description: Routing entries for objectKinds and tiers.

objectKind.description: Logical kind of artifact, used as input to routing.

tiers.description: Per-tier routing rules for this objectKind.

tier.description: Tier of the request or artifact.

defaultRepo.description: Default target repo for this objectKind at this tier.

defaultPathPrefix.description: Relative path prefix inside the target repository.

allowOverride.description: If true, manifests or policies may override this repo or path.

notes.description: Optional notes for this tier mapping.
